case_title: LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC VS. CRISTOBAL ANTONIO AVENDANO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,692.38 FILED BY LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC AS TO DEFENDANT AVENDANO, CRISTOBAL ANTONIO AKA CRISTOBAL AVENDANO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AVENDANO, CRISTOBAL ANTONIO AKA CRISTOBAL AVENDANO $1,692.38 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,802.38 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF MAR. 25, 2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $60.00) SERVED JAN-24-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AVENDANO, CRISTOBAL ANTONIO AKA CRISTOBAL AVENDANO
